name: math
description: Mathematical utility primitives including factorial, fibonacci, GCD, and primality testing.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: factorial
primitives.description: Compute the factorial of a non-negative integer

primitives.name: gcd
primitives.description: Compute the greatest common divisor of two integers

primitives.name: lcm
primitives.description: Compute the least common multiple of two integers

primitives.name: is-prime
primitives.description: Test whether an integer is prime
